title: Version 666
description: The world you made. The world that never was to be.
body:
The world you made.
The world that never was to be. You can not hide. ---

Mod discountined. Working on a new and better horror mod. It will be available on Modrinth soon but it is currently available on planetminecraft.


https://www.planetminecraft.com/mod/fear-jar/

Inspired by the broken script If you like this mod then i suggest you go check out the broken script --- **What the mod can do:** - Destroy and place blocks - Play audio - Summon entities - Change time - Apply damage to your player - Strike you with lightning - CRASH YOUR GAME (Can be disabled via chat command) - Mess with your oxygen bar - Make your character jump Note:
This mod does not include any events that will ban you from your world.

Playing the mod on multiplayer is not recommended as some things could break ---

Credits:

Made by CoolGuy42443
Inspired by The Broken Script made by wendigodrip

Created using MCreator
